2604.05875.title: Joint Knowledge Base Completion and Question Answering by Combining Large Language Models and Small Language Models
2604.05875.paper_summary: Knowledge Bases (KBs) play a key role in various applications. As two representative KB-related tasks, knowledge base completion (KBC) and knowledge base question answering (KBQA) are closely related and inherently complementary with each other. Thus, it will be beneficial to solve the task of joint KBC and KBQA to make them reinforce each other. However, existing studies usually rely on the small language model (SLM) to enhance them jointly, and the large language model (LLM)'s strong reasoning ability is ignored. In this paper, by combining the strengths of the LLM with the SLM, we propose a novel framework JCQL, which can make these two tasks enhance each other in an iterative manner. To make KBC enhance KBQA, we augment the LLM agent-based KBQA model's reasoning paths by incorporating an SLM-trained KBC model as an action of the agent, alleviating the LLM's hallucination and high computational costs issue in KBQA. To make KBQA enhance KBC, we incrementally fine-tune the KBC model by leveraging KBQA's reasoning paths as its supplementary training data, improving the ability of the SLM in KBC. Extensive experiments over two public benchmark data sets demonstrate that JCQL surpasses all baselines for both KBC and KBQA tasks.
2604.05875.paper_summary_zh: 知識庫（KBs）在各種應用中扮演著關鍵角色。作為兩個代表性的KB相關任務，知識庫補全（KBC）和知識庫問答（KBQA）彼此密切相關，並且本質上互為補充。因此，解決聯合KBC和KBQA的任務將有助於它們相互強化。然而，現有研究通常依賴小型語言模型（SLM）來共同增強它們，而忽略了大型語言模型（LLM）強大的推理能力。在本文中，通過結合LLM和SLM的優勢，我們提出了一個新穎的框架JCQL，該框架可以使這兩個任務以迭代的方式相互增強。為了使KBC增強KBQA，我們通過將一個基於SLM訓練的KBC模型作為代理的行動，來增強LLM代理基於KBQA模型的推理路徑，從而減輕LLM在KBQA中出現的幻覺和高計算成本問題。為了使KBQA增強KBC，我們通過利用KBQA的推理路徑作為其補充訓練數據，逐步微調KBC模型，從而提高SLM在KBC中的能力。對兩個公共基準數據集的廣泛實驗表明，JCQL在KBC和KBQA任務上均超越了所有基準。
2604.05875.author: Yinan Liu et.al.
2604.05875.authors: Yinan Liu, Dongying Lin, Sigang Luo, Xiaochun Yang, Bin Wang
